name: web-skills
displayName: Expert Skills for Web & Runtime Competence
description: 5 operational web/runtime skills: nodejs (mapped to the OpenJS Node.js certifications), typescript, react, nextjs, and react-native (the latter four are competence skills — no first-party certification exists). Each carries rules, decision tables, red flags, and tsc/node/test verify steps. Independent content; project/vendor marks (Node.js, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Expo) used for identification only. Guidance, not ground truth — verify against official docs.
